description: Ground truth for evaluating the web-audit loop against the playground. In issue mode (default) every scenario below must be found with the right principle and a sensible Modern Web Guidance id; in ?mode=fixed the audit must report zero findings. See PLAN.md open question #4 on scoring partial matches.

scenarios.expectedGuidanceQuery: responsive layout adapt to viewport mobile
scenarios.detectableVia: Resize to viewport 360x800; issue mode produces horizontal overflow and clips .fl-hero (width: 1200px).
scenarios.fix: Replace fixed width with width: 100%; max-width: 1200px and box-sizing: border-box so the layout adapts to narrow viewports.

scenarios.detectableVia: Emulate prefers-color-scheme: dark; the .ndm-card background stays #ffffff with no color-scheme declared.
scenarios.fix: Declare color-scheme: light dark and use light-dark() for surface and text colors so the card follows the user preference. Guidance id: dark-mode.

scenarios.expectedGuidanceQuery: visible focus indicator focus-visible keyboard accessibility
scenarios.detectableVia: Tab through .pf-btn controls with keyboard-only; issue mode sets outline: none with no replacement, so there is no visible focus indicator.
scenarios.fix: Remove the blanket outline: none and add a :focus-visible outline so keyboard focus is clearly indicated without affecting pointer clicks.

scenarios.expectedGuidanceQuery: prevent layout shift reserve space CLS aspect-ratio
scenarios.detectableVia: Observe the paragraph below .ls-slot shift down ~600ms after load when the banner injects; issue mode reserves no space.
scenarios.fix: Reserve the banner's space up front with min-height (or aspect-ratio) on the slot so the late content does not shift surrounding layout.

scenarios.expectedGuidanceQuery: respect reduced motion preference accessible animation
scenarios.detectableVia: Emulate prefers-reduced-motion: reduce; the .mv-card keeps its infinite slide animation in issue mode.
scenarios.fix: Gate the animation behind @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference) so it only runs when the user has not requested reduced motion.

scenarios.detectableVia: The same .cq-card stays in a side-by-side flex layout inside the 240px .cq-narrow container, cramping content; the component does not respond to its container width.
scenarios.fix: Add container-type: inline-size to the wrapper and a @container (max-width: 320px) rule that stacks the card, so the component adapts to its container rather than the viewport.

falsePositiveCheck: Run the same audit on ?mode=fixed. Each scenario above ships a corrected stylesheet (light-dark(), :focus-visible, reserved min-height, prefers-reduced-motion gate, @container, fluid max-width). The audit must report zero findings in fixed mode.
